source: Gijsbrechts et al. (2022), Manufacturing & Service Operations Management 24(3):1349-1368

protocol.baseline_note: Repo comparator is the best constant base-stock policy searched over the carried Van Roy action grid. The Gijs text clearly states the learned policy uses that grid, but the constant-base-stock search domain in the paper still needs final clarification.

reference.name: gijsbrechts2022_setting1
reference.source: Gijsbrechts et al. (2022), Manufacturing & Service Operations Management 24(3):1349-1368
reference.notes: Gijs setting 1 from Table 3. Public literature numbers are relative improvements only, so verification for this setting is based on reproducing the benchmark structure and comparing improvement percentages, not absolute costs.

repo_algorithm_rows.note: The paper reports only relative savings for the two Gijs settings, not absolute constant base-stock means. The open Van Roy case-study heuristic row is carried separately, but the current executable transcription does not yet reproduce that published cost.

published_policy_rows.note: Published Van Roy benchmark row, reported approximately.

reference.name: gijsbrechts2022_setting2
reference.source: Gijsbrechts et al. (2022), Manufacturing & Service Operations Management 24(3):1349-1368
reference.notes: Gijs setting 2 from Table 3. The paper reports that A3C improves approximately 12% over constant base-stock and slightly outperforms the earlier Van Roy approach, which reported around 10% savings.

repo_algorithm_rows.note: The paper reports only relative savings for the two Gijs settings, not absolute constant base-stock means. The open Van Roy case-study heuristic row is carried separately, but the current executable transcription does not yet reproduce that published cost.

published_policy_rows.note: Published Van Roy benchmark row, reported approximately.
